MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-14-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David Faraci, Esq. (415-504-2165) of Tobener Law Center for Plaintiff/ opposing party Cale Elliot.
Catharine Tolson, Esq.(650-989-5400) of Clapp Moroney for Defendant/Moving party Har Kwan Luk, Kwok Chung Wong, Stephen Wong, Lisa Wong.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant's Motion to Strike Complaint is moot. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-14-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David Faraci, Esq. (415-504-2165) of Tobener Law Center for Plaintiff/ opposing party Cale Elliot.
Catharine Tolson, Esq.(650-989-5400) of Clapp Moroney for Defendant/Moving party Har Kwan Luk, Kwok Chung Wong, Stephen Wong, Lisa Wong.

The Court states the reasons for the tentative ruling on the Demurrer. Plaintiff Argues they pled sufficiently with as much specificity. Defendant argues need more than bare bone elements. Both sides ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to allege each element of this cause of action by each Plaintiff as to each Defendant with requisite specificity. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
